title: Lupin Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Lupin Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Lupin Asia Pacific Associates are looking for an experienced Consultant Physician based out of Hyderabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Lupin Asia Pacific Associates:
Lupin Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lupin Asia Pacific Associates!
